---
title: "switchMap()"
description: "switchMap: project each source value to an inner; on a new source value, CANCEL the in-flight inner (its source `_deactivate`s — abortInFlight) and switch to the new one. Only the current inner's emissions are forwarded."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

switchMap: project each source value to an inner; on a new source value, CANCEL the in-flight
inner (its source `_deactivate`s — abortInFlight) and switch to the new one. Only the current
inner's emissions are forwarded.

## Import

```ts
import { switchMap } from "@graphrefly/ts";
```

## Signature

```ts
function switchMap(project: Project<TIn, TOut>): Operator<TIn, TOut>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `project` | `Project<TIn, TOut>` | project value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `Operator<TIn, TOut>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { switchMap } from "@graphrefly/ts";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/higher-order.ts`
